---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::::: grid
:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
# Lerneir Ruiz

### **Data Engineering & Analytics Specialist \| Financial Services Expertise**

I build scalable data solutions that drive operational ROI for global enterprises and financial institutions. Since 2019, I have specialized in transforming fragmented data ecosystems into high-performance assets, supporting clients across the Americas and Europe.

**Core Stack:** Python \| SQL \| Power BI \| Tableau \| Azure \|

Current Location: **Ontario, Canada**

::: {.about-links style="margin-top: 1.5em; margin-bottom: 2.5em;"}
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lerneir-ruiz-cifuentes-174350122/" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> LinkedIn </a> <a href="https://github.com/lerneir" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> GitHub </a> <a href="mailto:lerneir@yahoo.com" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> Email </a>
:::
::::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .text-center}
![](profile.jpg){.rounded width="240px" style="box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"}
:::
::::::

## What I Deliver: Core Solutions

Organizations today struggle with data silos, manual reporting bottlenecks, and the inability to scale predictive models. I resolve these through three core pillars:

::::::::: grid
:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon="false"}
### Data Engineering

Manual data extraction drains operational resources. I develop automated ETL workflows that permanently resolve these bottlenecks. I cut reporting times from hours to minutes in companies like Teleperformance, Nub 7/8, delivering immediate data for executive action.
:::
::::

:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon="false"}
### Predictive & Prescriptive Analytics

Historical data alone cannot protect your bottom line.

I engineer models that tell your leadership exactly how to respond to market changes. I use Machine Learning and prescriptive optimization to minimize financial risk and drive superior returns.
:::
::::

:::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.callout-important appearance="simple" icon="false"}
### Technical Strategy

Miscommunication between executives and technical teams wastes your budget.

I resolve the exact disconnect between business stakeholders and technical teams. As a Business Analyst at EY, I led teams to deliver data architecture that strictly achieves corporate objectives.
:::
::::
:::::::::

## Featured Strategic Project

### [**Professional S&P 500 Portfolio Optimization Framework**](projects/SP500_Portfolio/notebooks/SP500-Portfolio.ipynb)

Traditional investment models often break down when the market gets shaky, and they usually ignore the hidden costs of trading. I built a more realistic framework for managing S&P 500 portfolios that actually accounts for these "blind spots."

### How it works:

-   **The Targets:** The system focuses on the 15 largest companies in the index, making sure to clean up any redundant stock listings.

-   **The Strategy:** It uses advanced math to balance risk and reward, ensuring the portfolio isn't just chasing profits but is also staying protected.

-   **The Math:** I applied statistical "shrinking" techniques to make the data more reliable and less prone to errors.

-   **The Rules:** To keep things grounded in reality, I set strict limits on how much of any one stock we can own (between 2% and 25%) and factored in a 0.10% fee for every trade.

## **Global Consulting and Operational Engagements**

Large organizations cannot afford experimental data practices. As an analyst for EY and Teleperformance, I supported high profile enterprise clients. I build data solutions that meet the exact technical and operational requirements demanded by industry leaders.

-   Global Tech and Logistics: Cisco, Uber, DoorDash.

-   Telecom Leaders: FLOW, +movil, Liberty.

-   Financial Sector: Banco Finandina.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: card-text-center
<h4>Ready to upgrade your data capabilities and technical strategy?</h4>

<p>I engineer data systems that execute strict business goals. I am currently seeking opportunities to apply my technical architecture and strategic analysis skills to solve complex operational challenges in your organization.</p>

<p>Discover my full trajectory and technical arsenal on my <a href="about/"><strong>About Page</strong></a>.</p>

<p><strong>Direct contact:</strong> <a href="mailto:lerneir@yahoo.com" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button"> Email </a></p>
:::
